text_block_list.text:
One day, as we pass through the shopping district
on the way home...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh, they're doing something over there.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Step right up and try your luck with our New
Year's raffle! This year's grand prize is a hot
spring vacation for two!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
First-prize winners get a deluxe carrot hamburger
steak! Second-prize winners get a bushel of
carrots! And third-prize winners can take home a
single carrot!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Don't let this opportunity pass you by! Get a
ticket now and spin for your chance to win!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: A hot spring vacation, huh...
choice_data_list: Are you a fan of hot springs?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I guess I could say so? When I finish a big job, my
manager always takes me to one as a reward.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But I've never been to one on my own.

Suddenly, I remember I had received a raffle
ticket the last time I shopped over here.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: ...Sure, why not?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Can I do the spinning?
Gold City gives the raffle machine a gentle spin!

A small plastic ball drops from the tumbler's
opening...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Holy mackerel! We've got ourselves a grand-prize
winner! Come and get the coupon for your hot
spring vacation! Congratulations!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oooh!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Whoa, we actually won!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm shocked. That was way too easy...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Does this mean I'm...

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Maybe the gods did you a service for your
striking beauty, young lady!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You know what, I don't need this.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Thank you very much.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text: D-did I say something wrong?!

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
I'm always like this. Mother always scolded me for
making such unnecessary comments. Oh, I've
offended her!

After calming down the raffle clerk, I hurriedly
chase after Gold City with the vacation ticket in
hand.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Did I upset the guy from the raffle?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Uh-huh.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I know he didn't mean any offense.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: And after I won using your ticket, too. Shoulda just kept the coupon, but oh well.
choice_data_list: It's all right! He gave it to me!

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Seriously? In that situation?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Dang, you don't miss a trick, do you?
choice_data_list: But I think you won this ticket yourself.
But I think you won this ticket yourself.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I... I'm good. Can't take it now after what I did
back there.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: You use it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I probably wouldn't even enjoy it if I went.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: So... congrats. Bye now.

And that's how I end up holding onto the ticket
for the hot spring vacation.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Looks like we have another first-prize winner!
Congratulations! You get one deluxe carrot
hamburger steak!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Wow, it's massive.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
But it looks delicious... And the glazed carrot is so
shiny.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Too good, in fact. Bet my manager would be
pissed if I ate it all.
choice_data_list: You don't think you'll be able to balance it out?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Excuse me?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Who do you think you're talking to? I'm a
professional at maintaining my figure.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: It'll be fine. So... I guess I'll dig in.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'll eat all this and stay in shape. Just you watch.

Gold City chows down on her lip-smacking
hamburger steak and nonetheless manages to
keep in shape afterward—of course.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
We got a second-prize winner! It's your lucky day!
You're going home with a bushel of carrots!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Huh, a bushel. That's actually really helpful.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Carrots are supposed to be good for your skin.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And above all, they're delicious. So it's a plus to
have a bunch to keep for later. I'll leave them
with my manager.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Actually... there's something I've been wondering
about—you guys aren't such huge fans of carrots,
are you?
choice_data_list: Well, some people like them plenty.
Well, some people like them plenty.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: But you wouldn't fight over them or anything, would you? Meanwhile at the Tracen cafeteria, it's harder to find a dish that doesn't have carrots in it.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Of course, I'm sure there must be some students who don't like them, but I know I never met one.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
And, you know, I talked about carrots in a
magazine column before, and all the reactions I
got were from Umamusume.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I remember it struck me as weird. Carrots are
delicious, so... why's it just us?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I talked about this with my manager before, and
then she started carrying carrot sticks with her
everywhere.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: I'm not complaining, but it's not like I'm that in love with them. For instance, last week...

Leaving behind the topic of carrots, Gold City
continues sharing anecdotes about her manager
as we make our way back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Would you lookie here! You've won the third
prize! Here's your carrot!
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What am I supposed to do with one carrot?
choice_data_list:
Seems like more than enough for preparing a
meal.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
You're talking to an Umamusume. One is far from
enough.
choice_data_list:
Well, I was thinking you'd also use other
ingredients...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Oh, that's what you mean? ...I mean, I knew that.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Cooking, huh...

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: What? Like that's any of your business?

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
Just out of curiosity, though... If you were me,
what would you make with this carrot?

And so, I teach Gold City some recipes as we
make our way back to the academy.

text_block_list.name: Raffle Clerk
text_block_list.text:
Ohhh, tough luck! Looks like you pulled a blank
one! Take this pack of tissues as a consolation
prize.
You obtained: <itemname>

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: Lame. And I'm supposed to be a model.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text:
I get one chance and pull a pack of tissues. What
a joke.

text_block_list.name: Gold City
text_block_list.text: This is more than lame. This is, like, humiliating.
